display_information.name: PyFinAgent
display_information.description: Research-backed AI financial analyst with multi-agent reasoning
display_information.long_description: PyFinAgent analyzes stocks with evidence-based methods. Features: AI-powered research, backtesting with statistical rigor, real-time signal generation, portfolio oversight.

assistant_view.assistant_description: AI Financial Analyst — Evidence-based stock research with multi-agent reasoning (Planner, Analyst, Researcher)

suggested_prompts.title: Analyze a stock
suggested_prompts.message: Analyze AAPL using our framework. What's the investment thesis and risk profile?

suggested_prompts.title: Backtest a strategy
suggested_prompts.message: Backtest mean reversion in tech stocks over the last 2 years. Show Sharpe ratio and drawdown.

suggested_prompts.title: Research a topic
suggested_prompts.message: What's the latest academic research on AI-driven factor selection in quantitative trading?

suggested_prompts.title: Portfolio review
suggested_prompts.message: Review our current portfolio. What's the allocation, volatility, and tail risk?
